title: Duskbound Retexture
description: Gives the duskbound blocks from Quark a fresh look.
body:
This small resource pack simply gives quark's duskbound blocks a fresh coat of paint.

Extraction of file(s) not required for installing.

![duskbound used in a build reminiscent of an end-city, with the lanterns and ends rods giving light to the area.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/x1fZPrBP/images/64289d11caf046f6bc2cdfbb491c3a8627d9878b_350.webp)
![a small build showcasing the duskbound blocks, with the duskbound lantern in the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/x1fZPrBP/images/25057eb374676c25d97e503a622db1c8588a62a7.png)
